description_long: This is a large, double-headed battle axe with a robust, fantasy-inspired design. The axe features two wide, symmetrical blades with jagged, orange-tinted cutting edges and a dark, metallic core, giving it a menacing and decorative appearance. The central hub where the blades meet is reinforced with ornate metallic elements and a prominent orange gemstone or accent at the center. The handle is thick, wrapped in brown leather or similar material for grip, and ends in a heavy, faceted pommel that matches the metallic theme of the head. The overall construction suggests a weapon designed for both intimidation and heavy-duty use, with a blend of medieval and fantasy aesthetics. The materials and craftsmanship imply durability and significant weight, suitable for display or ceremonial use as well as practical application.
description: A large, double-bladed fantasy axe with jagged orange edges, a dark metallic core, and a thick, leather-wrapped handle. The design is ornate and robust, featuring a central orange accent and heavy pommel.
description_view_0: Front view showing both wide, jagged orange-edged blades, central orange accent, and full handle detail.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the blades and the thickness of the handle, with minimal blade width visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the symmetrical blade design and central hub details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin blade profile and handle thickness.
attribute_handle_type: Thick, straight handle with a round cross-section, wrapped in brown leather for grip, ending in a faceted metallic pommel.
attribute_blade_design: Double-headed, wide, symmetrical blades with jagged orange-tinted edges, dark metallic core, and central orange accent; no beard or poll, highly decorative.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern fantasy style with the blade integrated and reinforced into the handle using ornate metallic fittings.
